tooltip: Select Mipha Dorephan as your hero of choice.

heroSelectionDescriptionElements.tooltipText: Mipha focuses on improving units through Silver upgrades.
Allows you to summon Princess Mipha, a healing hero who attacks with her trident.
Allows the training of Miphas unique units and provides buffs to various other infantry.
Access to Lightscale Tridenteers, Powerful anticreature Knights, Aquamarines, Assassins and Silver Archers, ranged units that deal truedamage
Tower that can increase the defensive capabilities of other Buildings.
